chunk_0_e601fc94-5feb-4716-9eff-3731d7ea.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_0_e601fc94-5feb-4716-9eff-3731d7eadeac","metadata":{"original_file":"e601fc94-5feb-4716-9eff-3731d7eadeac"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"LEGALZOOM PARTNER API & GUARANTEE DOCUMENTATION (v2024.1)

SECTION 1: PARTNER API SPECIFICATIONS
Authentication:
All API requests require an OAuth 2.0 access token. Partners must obtain a 'client_id' and 'client_secret' from the Partner Portal. Tokens expire after 60 minutes.
Base URL: https://api.legalzoom.com/v2/partners/

Rate Limits:
- Sandbox Environment: 100 requests per minute.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"D6Zrh/Mj4UQMAZ05TiB4Ex1SUWT2ytUFhhpDjpGIVRY="}

chunk_1_f7210bc5-06ed-4d68-9bf0-aafb58c8.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_1_f7210bc5-06ed-4d68-9bf0-aafb58c881d2","metadata":{"original_file":"f7210bc5-06ed-4d68-9bf0-aafb58c881d2"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"- Production Environment: 1,000 requests per minute per IP address.
- 429 Error: "Too Many Requests" will be returned if limits are exceeded.

Endpoints:
- POST /formation/llc: Initiates a new LLC application. Payload must include 'business_name', 'state', and 'owner_contact'.
- GET /order/status/{id}: Returns current filing status. Status codes: PENDING, FILED, REJECTED, COMPLETED.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"NDXLS0ELQEZqsDN5DvobymekhpEAYgkUKVKmGfnz3Mo="}

chunk_2_86f9fa47-8b7f-48f7-b19d-2c2486ea.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_2_86f9fa47-8b7f-48f7-b19d-2c2486ea0c8c","metadata":{"original_file":"86f9fa47-8b7f-48f7-b19d-2c2486ea0c8c"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"Status codes: PENDING, FILED, REJECTED, COMPLETED.

SECTION 2: SATISFACTION GUARANTEE (THE "LZ GUARANTEE")
Refund Policy Overview:
We stand behind our products with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.
1. Self-Serve Filings: If you are not satisfied, you may request a refund within 60 days of purchase, provided the documents have NOT yet been filed with a government agency.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"EbTSXgYimyRLscmXnxREyHO2V4M/+lo/XM1CLEuDi/8="}

chunk_3_d5a805e0-b2fa-4946-b666-888443f2.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_3_d5a805e0-b2fa-4946-b666-888443f26041","metadata":{"original_file":"d5a805e0-b2fa-4946-b666-888443f26041"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"Once filed, government fees are non-refundable.
2. Subscription Services: Refundable within 30 days of initial purchase. After 30 days, subscriptions are non-refundable but can be cancelled to prevent future billing.
3. Attorney Consultations: Fees for attorney plans are non-refundable once a consultation has occurred.

Exclusions:
- Third-party filing fees paid to the Secretary of State are non-refundable under any circumstance once paid.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"1dR6e8u62gnXIe1qoO9//Us3twCcg49VyWyMgtD36do="}

chunk_4_98fa18b9-30f9-40c2-b59f-6c835a38.__data__: {"id_":"chunk_4_98fa18b9-30f9-40c2-b59f-6c835a385fd7","metadata":{"original_file":"98fa18b9-30f9-40c2-b59f-6c835a385fd7"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"- Shipping costs for physical corporate kits are non-refundable.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"\n","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"ER72ktUMYE3K+0vbarx+Wn7ZOLxf+I+q8H7gzHH6JRk="}

chunk_5_f8273bba-dbd8-45a1-a320-cb76819f.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_5_f8273bba-dbd8-45a1-a320-cb76819f55be","metadata":{"original_file":"f8273bba-dbd8-45a1-a320-cb76819f55be"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"LegalZoom LLC Formation Pricing

Basic Plan:
Cost: $0 + state filing fees
Includes:
- Articles of organization
- Name availability search

Pro Plan:
Cost: $249 + state filing fees
Includes:
- Everything in Basic
- Operating agreement
- EIN assistance

Premium Plan:
Cost: $299 + state filing fees
Includes:
- Everything in Pro
- Attorney guidance
- Rush processing","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"RbvDHxx0ukprgbLIhj9pW133hZ8uZTyDp6G6O5pv0hs="}

chunk_6_19c6e921-4670-418c-863b-0bfb2399.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_6_19c6e921-4670-418c-863b-0bfb2399ad0d","metadata":{"original_file":"19c6e921-4670-418c-863b-0bfb2399ad0d"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"LEGALZOOM CORPORATE STRATEGY OVERVIEW (FY 2024)

Executive Summary:
LegalZoom is the leading online platform for business formation in the US. The company is pivoting from a "transactional" model (one-off LLC filings) to a "subscription" model (ongoing tax and legal advice).

Key Financials:
- Annual Revenue: ~$680M.
- Subscription Revenue Growth: +6% YoY.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"ls8G+CIqypoQuJdn0dyV9c2YqB9WquCl0RwRcP2iiio="}

chunk_7_38426be3-76e0-42fa-950d-36ef8a6e.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_7_38426be3-76e0-42fa-950d-36ef8a6e6d31","metadata":{"original_file":"38426be3-76e0-42fa-950d-36ef8a6e6d31"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"- Subscription Revenue Growth: +6% YoY.
- Average Order Value (AOV): $234.

Competitive Landscape (Porter's Forces Analysis):
1. Threat of New Entrants (High):
   - Competitors like ZenBusiness and Stripe Atlas offer streamlined, lower-cost LLC formation ($0 + state fees).
   - LegalZoom's moat is "Brand Trust," but price sensitivity in the SMB market is a major risk.

2.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"RxVnki9Jr7PA0nOWHwhgiGfPF9EJ0HdIRUHiu3/44gc="}

chunk_8_5ba049c8-eeb7-4b47-8445-7b338bd6.__data__:
{"id_":"chunk_8_5ba049c8-eeb7-4b47-8445-7b338bd6ff2e","metadata":{"original_file":"5ba049c8-eeb7-4b47-8445-7b338bd6ff2e"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"2. Buyer Power (Moderate):
   - Customers have high churn after the first year. Most SMBs cancel subscriptions once their business is established.
   - Strategy: LegalZoom is launching "LZ Books" and "LZ Tax" to increase stickiness and retention.

3. Threat of Substitution (High):
   - AI Legal Tools (like ChatGPT) pose a long-term threat to the "DIY Legal Forms" business.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"/7NU/6oGP5hSumXjEKlVr6smN8WHO1Nwt7LtIQFQJ08="}

chunk_9_dc27eb66-a8ad-4458-91a1-e3d41498.__data__:

Strategic Priorities:
1. Increase "Subscription Attach Rate" (getting LLC buyers to buy Tax advice).
2. Partner Channel: Integrating LegalZoom flow into Wix and Squarespace.","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"/Zvej0kaV+LXbwyBgTmyci3rBD3/0rXLNtFTKT7y8Uw="}
